ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "list_name" TEXT /* Name of the list to which the book belongs */,
  "bestsellers_date" TEXT /* Date the book entered the bestseller list */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the book on the bestseller list */,
  "rank_last_week" INTEGER /* Rank of the book on the previous week */,
  "weeks_on_list" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the book has been on the bestseller list */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  "book_image" TEXT /* URL to the book's image */,
  "amazon_product_url" TEXT /* Amazon product link for purchasing */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book) */,
  "isbn10" TEXT /* 10-digit ISBN of the book */,
  "isbn13" TEXT /* 13-digit ISBN of the book */,
  "total_pages" INTEGER /* Total number of pages in the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition number of the book */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Type of cover (e.g., hardcover, paperback) */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series if the book is part of a series */,
  "series_volume" TEXT /* Volume number within the series */,
  "publication_city" TEXT /* City of publication */,
  "publication_country" TEXT /* Country of publication */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., author, editor) */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book associated with the contributor */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional note about the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contributor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the contributor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book being reviewed */,
  "review_link" TEXT /* Link to the book review */,
  "first_chapter_link" TEXT /* Link to the first chapter of the book */,
  "sunday_review_link" TEXT /* Link to the Sunday review of the book */,
  "article_chapter_link" TEXT /* Link to an article chapter related to the book */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the book */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the book was sold */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sale (e.g., store, online platform) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Name of the list to which the book belongs
Date the book entered the bestseller list
Current rank of the book on the bestseller list
Rank of the book on the previous week
Number of weeks the book has been on the bestseller list
Format of the book (e.g., hardcover, paperback, e-book)
Total number of pages in the book
Name of the series if the book is part of a series
Last date the record was updated
Role of the contributor (e.g., author, editor)
Reference to the book associated with the contributor
Reference to the book being reviewed
Link to the first chapter of the book
Link to the Sunday review of the book
Link to an article chapter related to the book
Price at which the book was sold
Location of the sale (e.g., store, online platform)
Date and time of the last login
Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive)
